reviewFocus: Check whether the concept brief separates framing, directional signal, and execution readiness instead of collapsing them into one claim.
Flag missing caveats when the support is synthetic, proxy-based, qualitative, or conditional.
Check that evidence labels stay generic and traceable without exposing private notes, raw source truth, or project-specific identifiers.
Keep prioritization, outreach, spend, launch timing, publication, and follow-up routing caller-owned.
outOfScope: Do not infer real market size, buyer urgency, willingness to pay, fundraising merit, launch readiness, or implementation priority.
Do not approve build commitments, outreach, spending, publication, or external promises.
Do not treat the fixture as a diligence memo, investment recommendation, or source of truth about a real market or product.
